fields.auditTrail: Append-only score log (model version, feature snapshot, threshold, outcome, override) in immutable storage, 7-year retention; monthly integrity check; quarterly internal-audit review.

rows.risk: False positives erode adjuster trust and SIU capacity
rows.mitigation: FPR ceiling 20% with monthly threshold review co-owned by SIU
Drift monitoring + retraining trigger tied to product releases

rows.risk: Prompt injection via manipulated claim narratives
rows.mitigation: Input isolation, schema-validated LLM output, adversarial test set
Counsel review each AI Act guidance update; Annex IV docs kept current

rows.risk: ClaimCenter vendor add-on unsupported in future versions
rows.mitigation: Contractual support commitment + batch fallback path
